content: خَطّ إيدَك حِلو لَمّا بِترَكِّز في كِتابَتَك
translations: eng:you handwriting is nice when you concentrate on your writing

transcriptions.arabizi: chatt 'ieed|ak hilw lamma bitrakkiz fi kitaebit|ak
